article_title: Mistral AI Secures $830 Million in Debt Financing to Build Its First Data Center Near Paris, Marking a Strategic Shift Toward European AI Infrastructure Sovereignty

content_preview.title: Mistral AI Secures $830 Million in Debt Financing to Build Its First Data Center Near Paris, Marking a Strategic Shift Toward European AI Infrastructure Sovereignty
content_preview.summary: The French AI startup raised $830M from seven banks to install 13,800 Nvidia GB300 GPUs at a 44 MW facility south of Paris, as it moves from renting cloud capacity to owning infrastructure.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Mistral AI, Europe's most heavily funded large language model developer, has closed $830 million in debt financing to build its first proprietary data center in Bruyères-le-Châtel, south of Paris, according to [The Next Web](https://thenextweb.com/news/mistral-ai-830m-debt-data-centre-paris). The facility will house 13,800 Nvidia GB300 GPUs and deliver 44 megawatts of computing capacity, with operations expected to begin by the second quarter of 2026, as reported by [SiliconANGLE](h...
